creator: M.Brachert@ethon.de
text: Ethon Technologies GmbH -- located in Munich, Germany -- has a strong focus on BSD driven solutions. We offer professional consulting services as well as BSD based telecommunication systems, ranging from basic PBX to telco solutions up to 10.000.000 Users. Feel free to contact us at info@ethon.de or drop us a voicemail: +49.89.2552456.0
